title: Software Engineer, Security (AI Code)
description:
**TL;DR** 
 We're looking for a Fullstack Engineer who lives and breathes AI code security. You'll design and build our static code analysis and security scanning capabilities, making Lovable the most secure AI-powered software creation platform on the planet.
   

  

 Why Lovable?
   

  

 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Lovable-built applications and websites are visited hundreds of millions of times a month, and our enterprise footprint is compounding fast. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

 What We're Looking For
   

  

* 3+ years of experience in code security, static analysis, or code scanning, ideally building or contributing to security-focused products (SAST, linters, vulnerability scanners, or similar - with AI or advanced machine learning techniques).
* 5+ years of full-stack engineering experience shipping high-quality products.
* Proficiency in modern frontend (React/TypeScript) and backend (Golang, Rust) development.
* Solid understanding of systems design, performance tradeoffs, and scalable architecture.
* Strong product sense and ability to translate security findings into intuitive, actionable user experiences.
* Bonus: Master's or PhD in code analysis, static analysis, or a related field. Experience integrating AI/LLMs into security tooling. Familiarity with mobile app security scanning.


 What You'll Do
   

  

* Build out our code scanning engine: Design and implement static analysis and security scanning that surfaces findings in user-generated application code across web and mobile.
* Ship features end-to-end across frontend, backend, and infrastructure as part of a small, self-sufficient team (≤3 engineers).
* Integrate AI/LLM capabilities into security workflows to detect, explain, and remediate vulnerabilities.
* Advocate for secure coding practices, conduct security-focused code reviews, and raise the bar across the engineering org.
* Influence our technical direction and product strategy with a security-first mindset.
* Help make Lovable the most secure AI product in the market.


**Our Tech Stack**
* Frontend: React and Typescript.
* Backend: Golang and Rust.
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Modal, multiple LLM providers.
* DevOps & Tooling: GitHub Actions, Grafana, OTEL, infra-as-code (Terraform).
* Data: Clickhouse, Firestore, Spanner, BigQuery.


 And we’re always exploring what’s next!
   

  

**How To Apply**
* Please submit your application in English—our working language at Lovable.
* We’re committed to fair and equal treatment for all candidates. If you’re interested, apply via our careers portal

title: External Business Consultant
description:
**Job Description**
 This role is part of the Automation Excellence Center (AEC) and is responsible for engineering, deploying, and operating AI/ML and GenAI capabilities that underpin agentic and closed-loop automation in telecom environments. The AI/ML Data Scientist will work hands-on across the full lifecycle—feature engineering from telecom datasets (KPIs, alarms, logs, events), model training and fine-tuning, containerized deployment, and post-deployment optimization. A key focus is embedding AI models and LLM-based components into automation frameworks, orchestration engines, and policy systems to enable event-driven decisioning and autonomous actions. The role also owns MLOps pipelines for model versioning, monitoring, drift detection, and continuous retraining, ensuring automation intelligence remains scalable, reliable, and production-grade as the organization advances toward Agentic Ops and higher Autonomous Network maturity.
   

  

**How You Will Contribute And What You Will Learn**
* Design, build, and fine-tune AI/ML and GenAI models that act as intelligent agents within automation workflows.
* Develop agentic AI components (decision agents, RCA agents, recommendation agents, remediation agents) that operate with minimal human intervention.
* Implement context-aware GenAI capabilities (LLMs, RAG, reasoning pipelines) to enhance automation intelligence and adaptability.
* Embed AI/ML models into closed-loop automation pipelines—from signal ingestion and insight generation to action execution.
* Integrate AI components with automation frameworks, orchestration engines, policy systems, and workflow platforms.
* Enable event-driven and intent-based automation aligned to Autonomous Network maturity (L3/L4).
* Build and operate MLOps pipelines to support model deployment, monitoring, retraining, and lifecycle governance.
* Standardize AI assets (models, prompts, agents, pipelines) for reuse and scale across multiple use cases and customers.
* Continuously tune automation models for accuracy, reliability, latency, and business impact.
* Drive AI-powered automation use cases such as anomaly detection, root cause analysis, predictive assurance, intelligent provisioning, and service experience automation.
* Work closely with network, OSS/BSS, and automation architects to ensure solutions reflect real-world telecom constraints and SLAs.
* Support multi-vendor and multi-domain automation scenarios.


**Key Skills And Experience**
* Strong hands-on expertise in Python and AI/ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn).
* Practical experience implementing GenAI and LLM-based systems (RAG pipelines, embeddings, vector databases, prompt engineering).
* Experience deploying AI components into automation platforms using Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud-native environments.
* Solid understanding of MLOps for automated systems (CI/CD for models, drift detection, observability).
* Strong understanding of telecom network operations (Core, RAN, Transport, OSS/BSS).
* Experience working with automation frameworks, orchestration engines, and workflow systems.
* Familiarity with telecom operational data (KPIs, alarms, logs, events) used in closed-loop automation.
* Experience designing agent hierarchies and multi-agent systems.
* Exposure to Autonomous Networks maturity models and intent-driven operations.
* Knowledge of observability platforms enabling intelligent automation.
* Experience in Automation CoE / Platform teams.
* 7 year+ experience


**About Us**
**Advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.**
 Nokia is a global leader in connectivity for the AI era. With expertise across fixed, mobile and transport networks, powered by the innovation of Nokia Bell Labs, we’re advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.
   

  

 Learn more about life at Nokia .
   

  

**Our recruitment process**
 We act inclusively and respect the uniqueness of people. Our employment decisions are made regardless of race, color, national or ethnic origin, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. We are committed to a culture of inclusion built upon our core value of respect.
   

  

 If you’re interested in this role but don’t meet every listed requirement, we still encourage you to apply. Unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences enrich our teams, and you may be just the right candidate for this or another opportunity.
   

  

 The length of the recruitment process may vary depending on the specific role's requirements. We strive to ensure a smooth and inclusive experience for all candidates. Discover more about the recruitment process at Nokia .
   

  

**About The Team**
 Some of our benefits in Portugal :
   

  

* Flexible working arrangements and additional flex benefits to support work–life balance
* A minimum of 90 days of Maternity and Paternity Leave, with the option to return to work within a year following the birth or adoption of a child (based on eligibility)
* Medical and life insurance plan, plus paid sick leave for added security
* Meal allowance to support daily needs
* Car allowance based on eligibility
* Well-being programs to support your mental and physical health
* Opportunities to engage with Nokia Employee Resource Groups (NERGs), as well as access to mentors, coaches, and Employee Growth Solutions
* A learning culture that promotes continuous personal and professional growth – for your role and beyond

title: Junior utvecklare till Tiego – utveckla affärskritiska system och väx med oss
description:
Vill du växa som utvecklare och samtidigt få arbeta med system som används av några av Nordens största företag?
 



 Vi söker nu en junior fullstack-utvecklare som vill vara med och vidareutveckla våra produkter inom koncernredovisning och leasinghantering. Du kommer att arbeta med moderna webbapplikationer och få möjlighet att utvecklas inom frontend, backend, databaser och AI-assisterad utveckling.
 



 Tjänsten är en heltidsanställning med start den 1 september och är initialt en sex månader lång projektanställning för att täcka upp under en föräldraledighet. Vår ambition är att rollen ska kunna övergå i en tillsvidareanställning om både du och vi trivs tillsammans.
 



**Om Tiego** 




 Tiego utvecklar affärssystem för koncernredovisning och leasinghantering. Våra produkter används av börsnoterade bolag, fastighetskoncerner, industriföretag och offentliga verksamheter för affärskritiska processer där kvalitet, spårbarhet och tillförlitlighet är avgörande.
 



 Bakom användargränssnitten finns avancerade beräkningar, stora datamängder och komplex affärslogik. Som utvecklare hos oss får du därför möjlighet att arbeta med både teknik och verksamhetsnära problemställningar.
 



 Vi är idag sex utvecklare och arbetar i nära samarbete med produktansvariga, konsulter och kunder. Det innebär korta beslutsvägar, stort inflytande över produkterna och möjlighet att göra skillnad från första dagen. Du blir en del av utvecklingsteamet och får vara med och vidareutveckla lösningar som används i affärskritiska processer hos några av Nordens största företag.
 



**Om rollen** 




 Under hösten kommer en större del av arbetet att vara kopplat till våra webbgränssnitt, samtidigt som du får möjlighet att lära dig backendutveckling i C#/.NET, databaser och produktutveckling. Du kommer att få stöd av erfarna utvecklare men också uppmuntras att ta egna initiativ och successivt ta större ansvar.
 



 Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:
 



 • Utveckla nya funktioner i våra webbapplikationer
 



 • Arbeta med Angular och TypeScript
 



 • Delta i design och utveckling av användargränssnitt
 



 • Bidra till backendutveckling i C#/.NET
 



 • Arbeta med databaser och SQL Server
 



 • Felsöka, förbättra och vidareutveckla befintliga lösningar
 



 • Utforska hur AI kan användas för att effektivisera utveckling och skapa nya funktioner i våra produkter
 



**Teknik** 




 Vi arbetar bland annat med:
 



 • Angular
 



 • TypeScript
 



 • C# / .NET
 



 • SQL Server
 



 • Azure
 



 • Git
 



 AI är en naturlig del av vårt dagliga utvecklingsarbete. Vi använder AI-stöd för att effektivisera utveckling, kvalitetssäkring och problemlösning samtidigt som vi utforskar hur AI kan skapa värde för våra kunder genom nya funktioner i produkterna.
 



 Du behöver inte vara expert på AI, men vi tror att du är nyfiken på hur tekniken kan användas i praktiken.
 



**Vem är du?** 




 Vi tror att du:
 



 • Studerar eller nyligen har avslutat en utbildning inom systemutveckling eller liknande
 



 • Har erfarenhet av Angular, TypeScript eller annan modern frontendutveckling
 



 • Har grundläggande kunskaper i C#/.NET
 



 • Gillar problemlösning och vill förstå hur system fungerar på djupet
 



 • Är nyfiken, ansvarstagande och vill utvecklas som utvecklare
 



 • Kommunicerar väl på svenska och engelska
 



 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av SQL, Azure eller AI-relaterade projekt.
 



 Vi förväntar oss inte att du kan allt från start. Det viktigaste är att du är nyfiken, vill lära dig och tycker om att lösa problem. Om du känner igen dig i beskrivningen men inte uppfyller alla punkter uppmuntrar vi dig ändå att söka.
 



**Varför Tiego?** 




 Hos oss får du:
 



 • Lära dig av erfarna kollegor och snabbt få eget ansvar
 



 • Erfarenhet av affärssystem och komplex problemlösning
 



 • Möjlighet att påverka produkter som används av stora organisationer
 



 • Flexibla arbetstider och hybridarbete
 



 • Centralt kontor på Sveavägen i Stockholm
 



 • Möjlighet att arbeta med modern AI-assisterad utveckling
 



 • Goda möjligheter till fortsatt anställning efter projektperioden
 



 Vi tror på att ge människor ansvar tidigt och låta idéer väga tyngre än titel eller erfarenhet. För oss är nyfikenhet, samarbete och vilja att utvecklas minst lika viktigt som teknisk erfarenhet.
 



**Intresserad?** 




 Skicka CV och några rader om dig själv till:
 



**Katarina von Wachenfeldt** 




 katarina.wachenfeldt@tiego.se
 


* Vi intervjuar löpande och ser fram emot att höra från dig.

title: Sales Specialist
description:
**Zeeder** 
 is creator-gifting infrastructure for e-commerce brands. A brand connects their Shopify store, picks a product, and we route it to the creators who actually want it. Sourcing, screening, shipping, and post-tracking, all handled. What used to be hours of manual DMs and spreadsheets becomes a two-minute daily queue.
 



  





 We're early, founder-led, and already working with paying brands like Hickap, who turn 70%+ of gifted products into posted content. Now we're scaling outreach beyond Sweden.
 



  





**What you'd do:** 




 • Find and qualify mid-market Nordic DTC brands (beauty, fashion, wellness, food, on Shopify)
 



 • Run cold outreach across email, LinkedIn, and phone
 



 • Book qualified demo calls (we close them together at first, then you start closing your own)
 



 • Keep the pipeline clean and the follow-ups tight
 



  





 Your unfair advantage: the wishlist. Creators on Zeeder add the brands they want free products from. So instead of a cold pitch, you open with "9 named Swedish creators with 1.8M combined monthly views already want to work with you." That line turns cold outreach warm faster than anything else we've tried.
 



  





**Who I'm looking for:** 




 • You sell fluently in English and Swedish
 



 • You love the top of the funnel: prospecting, outreach, booking meetings
 



 • You're comfortable building the playbook as you go, not inheriting one
 



 • Bonus: you know DTC, e-commerce, or creator and influencer marketing
 



  





**The upside:** 




 • Uncapped, recurring commission. Every brand you bring on pays you a cut of their monthly subscription, so the book you build keeps paying you month after month.
 



 • A real path to GTM Lead. This is the early seat that grows into the team you run.
 



 • Fully remote, flexible hours, anywhere in the Nordics.
 



  





 If getting brands excited is your thing, DM me or email manu@zeeder.co with the best cold outreach you've ever sent and why it worked.

title: Senior Embedded Firmware Engineer
description:
**Senior Embedded Firmware Engineer – Wireless Access control & IoT**
 Location: Stockholm, Sweden
   

  

 Hybrid role | Digital & Access Solutions EMEIA
   

  

**Build Secure Embedded Firmware for ARM Cortex-Based Wireless IoT Devices Used in Real-World Access Systems**
 At ASSA ABLOY you will develop the firmware behind APERIO® — a globally deployed range of wireless locks used in environments where reliability, security, and performance are non-negotiable.
   

  

 If you enjoy working close to hardware, debugging real time system behaviour, and building firmware that operates under strict power, security, and reliability constraints — this role will likely resonate.
   

  

**Why this role matters**
 Wireless access control systems are becoming smarter, more connected, and increasingly security-critical. The firmware behind these devices directly impacts reliability, performance, connectivity, and user trust.
   

  

 As part of our Wireless Lock product unit, you’ll help shape the next generation of secure embedded IoT solutions — contributing directly to how our products perform in the field and influencing technical decisions that affect global deployments.
   

  

**The role**
 This is a senior engineering role where you own the design and evolution of embedded firmware for wireless access devices operating in constrained, security-critical environments. You will influence architecture, make key technical decisions, and ensure reliability, performance, and security across real-world deployments.
   

  

 You’ll collaborate closely with hardware and product teams, translating system requirements into robust embedded solutions that scale across global installations.
   

  

**What You’ll Work On**
* Develop secure and reliable embedded firmware in C for ARM Cortex M0–M4 platforms
* Implement and improve wireless connectivity features including BLE, Zigbee, NFC/ISO14443
* Debug complex embedded systems using oscilloscopes, logic analysers, and other hardware tools
* Work across RTOS and bare-metal environments, contributing to robust and maintainable architectures
* Improve low-power performance and battery efficiency for connected devices
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and modern embedded development practices


**What Will Help You Succeed**
* 5+ years of expertise in embedded C development on ARM Cortex MCUs (STM32, nRF52, TI, or similar)
* Solid experience with RTOS and/or bare-metal systems
* Strong background in firmware architecture work and specifications
* Proven track record in mentoring more junior developers
* Practical experience with CI/CD setup


**You have strong expertise in one or more of the following areas:**
* wireless communication technologies (such as BLE, Zigbee, UWB, Wi-Fi) and protocols, ultra low-power optimisation.
* Embedded security design and protocols, cybersecurity compliance, RFID/NFC technology, access control systems.


**Why ASSA ABLOY**
 At ASSA ABLOY, you’ll join a global technology leader while working in a team where embedded engineering plays a central role in product innovation. You’ll have the freedom to influence technical decisions, work closely with real hardware, and build products used by millions of people worldwide.
   

  

* Meaningful mission — Build technology that helps secure hospitals, schools, workplaces, and public spaces globally
* Innovation and scale — Work with wireless IoT technologies, secure access systems, and connected embedded devices at global scale
* Autonomy and trust — Influence firmware architecture, technical direction, and product improvements in a collaborative engineering culture
* Growth and development — Deepen your expertise in embedded systems, wireless communication, low-power design, and technical leadership
* Work–life balance — Be part of a sustainable Scandinavian work culture focused on collaboration, flexibility, and long-term success


**Ready to help shape the future of wireless access?**
 If you’re motivated by embedded systems, connected devices, and solving real-world technical challenges, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

 Apply today and help us create safer, smarter, and more connected environments worldwide.
   

  

 We review applications continuously, so don’t wait.
   

  

 We’re committed to building diverse, inclusive teams and encourage applications from all who see themselves thriving here. To make sure your personal data stays protected, we do not review applications sent via email or post. If you have questions about the role or process, contact Léa Rein, Senior Talent Acquisition Business Partner at lea.rein@assaabloy.com.
   

  

**Let’s create a safer and more open world — together.**
**We are the ASSA ABLOY Group**
 Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.
   

  

 As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.
   

  

 As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

title: Account Executive
description:
Vill du vara med och skapa tillväxt i ett av Nordens mest spännande SaaS-bolag? Gillar du att driva affärer hela vägen från första mötet till ett etablerat partnerskap - och samtidigt bygga relationer som håller långt efter att bläcket på avtalet torkat? Då kanske du är den vi letar efter!
   

  

**Rollen**
 Som Account Executive hos oss blir du en central del i att skapa tillväxt för både Lime och våra kunder. Du kommer att:
   

  

* Driva nykundsaffären och bygga en pipeline genom hög aktivitet och många interaktioner och dialoger varje vecka.
* Förvalta och utveckla befintliga kunder, med fokus på långsiktigt värde och ökad affärsnytta.
* Ha daglig kontakt med flera stakeholders hos kunder, ofta på C-level och i seniora ledningsgrupper.
* Bli en del av ett starkt säljteam som vinner tillsammans.


 Här kommer du att bli en del av både den lokala och svenska säljavdelningen. Vår säljkultur handlar om att bygga ett starkt team, där vi hjälper varandra framåt men samtidigt drivs av den individuella prestationen. Hos oss är det lagkänslan som gör skillnaden - och vi ser det som allas ansvar att tillsammans driva Lime framåt.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
**Vem är du?**
 Vi tror att du har:
   

  

* 3+ års erfarenhet av B2B-försäljning, gärna inom SaaS, IT eller liknande komplexa lösningar.
* Dokumenterad förmåga att hantera hela säljcykeln - från prospektering till avslut och uppföljning.
* Arbetat mot medelstora bolag i Sverige, med en säljcykel på 3-6 månader.
* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom relevant område för tjänsten.
* Erfarenhet av, eller ett intresse för att utforska och arbeta med AI.
* Kan uttrycka dig flytande i såväl svenska som engelska.
* B-körkort.


 Du har ett genuint intresse för att bygga starka kundrelationer och kombinerar en affärsmässig skärpa med en social och utåtriktad personlighet. Din höga aktivitetsnivå smittar av sig - du får energi av att ha många dialoger igång samtidigt och ser varje möte som en chans att skapa värde. På samma gång är du nyfiken och kreativ, alltid på jakt efter nya idéer som kan driva kundernas framgång framåt.
   

  

 Och kanske viktigast av allt: du vet att framgång smakar allra bäst när den delas, och därför är du en lagspelare som bidrar till att lyfta hela teamet.
   

  

**Varför Lime?**
 På Lime Technologies blir du en del av ett tillväxtbolag där vi kombinerar teknik, affär och människa - alltid med hjärtat på rätt ställe. Vi tror på att framgång byggs i team, att högt tempo kan kombineras med mycket glädje och att våra kunder ska känna att vi alltid är nära och engagerade.
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjlighet att påverka, utvecklas och ta nästa steg i din karriär inom försäljning. Sedan har vi även kollektivavtal, sex veckors semester, friskvårdsbidrag, pension och annat bra som gör vardagen enklare.
   

  

**Processen?**
 I första steget screenar vi din ansökan. Därefter följer intervjuer, ett praktiskt case samt referenstagning. Vår process avslutas alltid med slutintervju med vår VD Tommas.
   

  

 Vi har ingen hård deadline, utan det viktigast är att vi hittar rätt person. Vi har därför löpande urval och kör på tills det blir en perfekt match.
   

  

 Låter det här som ditt nästa steg? Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
As a Sales Development Representative for CCH® Tagetik, you play a crucial role at the beginning of the sales journey. You are responsible for generating, qualifying, and developing high-quality leads that fuel the sales pipeline across the Nordic markets. Working closely with Sales, Marketing, and Partners, you act as a key link between market opportunity and commercial success. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys outbound prospecting, strategic conversations, and building long-term value with clear growth opportunities toward an account management or sales position.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Actively prospect and qualify new leads through outbound calls, social selling, and targeted campaigns
* Build, manage, and continuously enrich a strong and qualified sales pipeline
* Engage with both new prospects and an existing customer base
* Identify decision-makers, initiate conversations, and secure high-quality sales meetings
* Collaborate closely with Sales, Marketing, Partners, and Customer Success teams to convert leads into opportunities
* Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in CRM systems
* Analyse sales activities, track performance, and report on pipeline and lead trends
* Develop and present tailored sales quotes and proposals
* Support strategic sales initiatives, marketing events, and growth projects
* Act as a trusted point of reference and mentor for junior colleagues


**Your Profile**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent professional experience
* Minimum 2 years of experience in inside sales, business development, or commercial prospecting
* Solid understanding of early-stage sales processes, including lead generation and qualification
* Strong, hands-on experience with Sales Navigator and other prospect mapping tools
* Proven experience working with CRM systems (Salesforce or similar)
* Analytical mindset combined with excellent organizational skills and high attention to detail
* Ambition to grow within a commercial organization and evolve toward broader sales responsibilities
* Languages: Fluent English and Fluent Swedish


**Soft Skills**
 You are a confident and professional communicator who enjoys engaging with a wide range of stakeholders, including senior decision-makers. You combine persistence with creativity and know how to overcome objections in a respectful and strategic way. You are results-oriented, proactive, and resilient, able to work independently while staying closely connected to your team. Your adaptability, patience, and collaborative mindset allow you to thrive in a dynamic and evolving environment.
   

  

**Why Choose Wolters Kluwer & CCH® Tagetik**
 With over 180 years of expertise, Wolters Kluwer is a global leader in software and information solutions. At CCH® Tagetik, you contribute to cutting-edge financial performance management solutions used by organizations worldwide. You will join an innovative, international environment where learning, collaboration, and personal growth are truly valued.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* Permanent contract with a competitive salary and attractive commission plan
* Hybrid working model with 1 day per week in our London Canary Wharf or Stockholm office
* Flexible working hours and strong focus on work-life balance
* Work From Anywhere days to give you flexibility beyond the office
* Structured onboarding and continuous learning opportunities
* Clear career progression paths within Wolters Kluwer, both locally and internationally
* A dynamic, young, and supportive team culture
* Team events, social activities, and networking opportunities


**This role can be hired in Sweden or the UK.**
**Ready to Take the Next Step?**
 Apply now via our website or LinkedIn and help shape the future of finance with CCH® Tagetik at Wolters Kluwer.
   

  

 Our Interview Practices
   

  

*To maintain a fair and genuine hiring process, we kindly ask that all candidates participate in interviews without the assistance of AI tools or external prompts. Our interview process is designed to assess your individual skills, experiences, and communication style. We value authenticity and want to ensure we’re getting to know you—not a digital assistant. To help maintain this integrity, we ask to remove virtual backgrounds and include in-person interviews in our hiring process. Please note that use of AI-generated responses or third-party support during interviews will be grounds for disqualification from the recruitment process.*
*Applicants may be required to appear onsite at a Wolters Kluwer office as part of the recruitment process.*

title: Field CTO EMEA
description:
**Field CTO**
 Location -EMEA
   

  

**About Unframe**
 Unframe is an AI-first startup helping the world’s largest enterprises bring LLM-powered applications to life in days - not months. We combine the speed of a product company with the flexibility of a consultancy, helping customers move from idea to deployed AI systems faster than anyone else in the market.
   

  

 With over $100M in TCV secured within 12 months, and a new $50M Series B led by Highland Europe, Unframe is rapidly scaling globally alongside Fortune 500 customers, backed by Bessemer, Craft, and TLV.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are hiring a
 **Field CTO / Head of Technical Evangelism** 
 to lead technical conversations in enterprise sales cycles and build a world-class evangelism function.
   

  

 This is a front-line, revenue-driving leadership role.
   

  

 You will serve as the technical authority in early-stage customer conversations, translate architecture into business value, and build a team of evangelists who can scale our message across regions and industries.
   

  

 You must be equally comfortable speaking with CIOs and whiteboarding architecture for engineering teams.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 Lead Technical Strategy in Enterprise Sales
   

  

* Join intro and discovery calls with enterprise prospects
* Own architecture and technical validation discussions
* Translate Unframe’s building block architecture into customer-specific solutions
* Address technical objections


**Evangelize Unframe Externally**
* Represent Unframe at executive briefings, conferences, and industry events
* Deliver compelling technical presentations and live architecture sessions
* Build repeatable demo narratives tailored by vertical and persona
* Create thought leadership content (talks, workshops, articles)


**Build and Lead the Evangelism Function**
* Develop standardized:
+ Technical pitch frameworks
+ Demo flows
+ Objection-handling playbooks
+ Verticalized narratives

* Create consistency and excellence across field technical engagements


**Partner Cross-Functionally**
* Collaborate closely with Sales on deal strategy
* Provide structured field feedback to Product
* Help refine positioning against consultancies, point tools, and orchestration stacks


 What Success Looks Like (12 Months)
   

  

* A repeatable, differentiated technical narrative across the field
* Increased win rates in technically complex deals
* A high-performing evangelism team supporting multiple regions
* Strong executive trust with CIO/CTO-level buyers
* Clear positioning in competitive enterprise AI environments


**Who You Are**
* Senior technical leader with deep enterprise AI experience and significant customer-facing exposure (Field CTO, VP Solutions Engineering, Principal Architect, Technical Founder, or equivalent).
* Deep knowledge of:
+ LLM architectures
+ AI orchestration frameworks
+ Enterprise integrations
+ Security and deployment models

* Experienced in enterprise sales cycles
* Strong team builder with experience hiring and leading technical talent
* Exceptional communicator who simplifies complexity without losing credibility
* Public speaking or published technical thought leadership
* Experience in data-intensive industries (financial services, real estate, enterprise services)
* Experience building technical enablement programs


 You think commercially. You understand that speed-to-value wins.
   

  

**Why Join Unframe**
* Real ownership from day one. Drive decisions, shape ideas and make them work.
* Your fastest learning years. Build alongside founders in a space that moves weekly.
* You'll have the opportunity to write and build what comes next.

title: Software Design QA Lead
description:
**Mission**
 Neko is redefining what prevention means, from treating illness when it arrives, to sustaining health before it's ever at risk. Our mission: make data-driven, preventative care accessible to more people, before symptoms appear.
   

  

 In a single, non-invasive visit under an hour, proprietary technology and direct clinical care combine to deliver personalised, actionable insights. It's a team that thinks in 10x, not 10%. Every role here plays a part in building a world where prevention is the norm, and where your work genuinely helps people live longer, healthier lives.
   

  

**Role Purpose**
 As a Software QA Engineering Lead, you will ensure the quality, safety, and regulatory compliance of our Software as a Medical Device (SaMD) and emerging AI-enabled healthcare products.
   

  

 You will work closely with software engineers, DevOps teams, product development teams, the Verification & Validation function, and regulatory stakeholders to ensure software meets quality and regulatory standards while enabling fast and efficient development cycles.
   

  

 This role is an individual contributor position focused on embedding quality practices directly into software development processes. You will contribute to shaping modern QA approaches that prioritize automation, integrated documentation, and efficient quality workflows rather than traditional documentation-heavy processes.
   

  

 Your work will help ensure that Neko Health continues to build safe, compliant, and high-quality health technology while maintaining the agility required in a fast-moving healthtech environment.
   

  

**What You'll Deliver In The First 6–12 Months**
* Establish strong collaboration with engineering and product teams to embed quality practices into development workflows.
* Collaborate with the V&V function to support verification and validation activities for Software as a Medical Device (SaMD), ensuring alignment with regulatory requirements.
* Support risk management and compliance activities related to software systems and AI-enabled features.
* Improve QA workflows by introducing automation, tooling, and AI-assisted processes that increase efficiency and reduce manual work.
* Identify opportunities to strengthen quality systems and continuously improve development and testing processes.
* Provide clear communication on quality risks, progress, and issues, ensuring effective collaboration with stakeholders.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Experience working in Software Quality Assurance within regulated environments such as medical devices, healthtech, or digital health.
* Experience working with Software as a Medical Device (SaMD) or other regulated healthcare software products.
* Strong understanding of software development processes, testing strategies, and development pipelines.
* Experience collaborating closely with software engineers and cross-functional product teams.
* Ability to work independently and take ownership of QA activities in a fast-moving environment.
* Strong communication skills with the ability to clearly communicate risks, issues, and progress.
* Comfortable using AI tools and automation to improve workflows and productivity.
* Fluent written and spoken English.


**Preferred**
* Experience working in healthtech startups, digital health platforms, or software-first medtech companies.
* Familiarity with regulatory frameworks such as IEC 62304, ISO 13485, ISO 14971, MDR, or FDA requirements.
* Experience working with DevOps environments, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing frameworks.
* Experience supporting software products that incorporate AI or machine learning components.
* Hands-on experience improving workflows through automation, scripting, or tooling.
* Experience working in fast-scaling organizations with evolving processes.


**About Titles At Neko**
 We use a simplified internal title framework that prioritises clarity over hierarchy, so internal titles may differ from market‑facing role titles. Scope, impact and level of the role are fully aligned and will be clearly discussed throughout the process.
   

  

**Hiring Process**
 Candidates progress from application and structured screening through thoughtfully designed interviews culminating in a formal offer and final pre-employment checks before joining the team.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity & Inclusion Statement**
 Neko Health is committed to inclusive hiring and member-first care. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and encourage you to request reasonable adjustments to support your application.

title: Senior Infrastructure Domain Architect
description:
**Job Description**

 The Senior Infrastructure Domain Architect for the Global Infrastructure Unit is responsible for defining and governing the technical infrastructure that supports all sites across the H&M Group (stores, warehouses, offices, datacenters, cloud), digital commerce platforms, supply chain systems, and enterprise applications and operations. The role focuses on delivering a scalable, secure, and high-performing infrastructure environment that enables omnichannel retail experiences and operational efficiency.
   

  





 The Global Infrastructure Unit at H&M Group consists of approx. 60 people plus a large manage service delivery and spans across four delivery areas: Cloud & Datacenter, Site Tech, Network, and Digital Workplace.
   

  





  

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO:**




**Architecture & Strategy:**



* Define and maintain the infrastructure architecture roadmap, principals, guidelines, and guardrails and ensure alignment with business strategy.
* Translate enterprise architecture future state vision and principles into concrete infrastructure designs and standards.
* Proactively and holistically lead architecture activities that guide development and management of infrastructure platforms and services.
* Drive the transformation of systems into hybrid or cloud-native platforms (e.g. Azure, AWS).
* Drive adoption of new technology and reuse existing technology for enabling capabilities and processes, information and technical solutions.
* Define reference architectures for third-party vendor solutions and ensure long-term fit into H&M’s architecture landscape.



**Operational excellence**



* Architect resilient infrastructure to support critical systems, including:
	+ E-commerce platforms
	+ Point-of-Sale (POS) systems
	+ Inventory and order management systems (OMS/WMS)
	+ CRM and loyalty platforms
* Design infrastructure to ensure minimal downtime and fast recovery across all sites and digital platforms.
* Lead capacity planning for high-volume retail periods.
* Analyze current technology environment to identify dependencies, detect critical deficiencies and proactively recommend solutions for improvement.
* Define and implement monitoring, logging, and disaster recovery strategies for all infrastructure components.
* Work closely with DevOps, security, and IT operations teams to streamline deployments and incident response.



**Collaboration & Governance:**



* Provide leadership and motivate teams to standardize and harmonize solutions, to lower the total cost of ownership, develop investment plans and reduce technical debt.
* Advice on and make architectural decisions needed to deliver targeted business outcomes.
* Establish and enforce infrastructure standards and governance for store rollouts, cloud deployments, and vendor integrations.
* Act as the primary infrastructure interface to Enterprise Architecture and business architecture teams.
* Mentor and coach architects and engineers in the teams, promoting their professional growth - confidently provide architectural leadership, guidance, and support for others.



  

  





**WHO YOU ARE:**



* Proven experience designing and governing large-scale, global infrastructure environments.
* Experience applying architecture frameworks, principles, standards, and reference architectures.
* Ability to perform architectural trade-off analysis across cost, risk, performance, and operability.
* Expertise in hybrid infrastructure environments (on-prem + cloud).
* Familiarity with retail-specific systems such as:
	+ POS platforms
	+ ERP/WMS integrations
	+ Mobile device management for store tablets and handhelds
* Experience with infrastructure systems across network and hosting.
* Strong understanding of cybersecurity in a retail environment (PCI compliance, secure payment processing).
* Ability to design high-availability and disaster recovery solutions for global retail operations.
* Proven experience in working strategically with third-party relationships, vendors and influencing their offerings and roadmaps.
* Excellent communication and leadership skills; able to present to both technical and non-technical audiences.
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field.
* 15+ years of IT infrastructure experience with at least 5 years in a Domain Architect role (or equivalent).
* Proven experience in leading architecture teams. Formal leadership training is required.
* Experience in a retail or e-commerce environment is highly preferred.
* Hands-on knowledge of cloud infrastructure (Azure or AWS), hosting technologies, networking, and data center technologies.



 Preferred Certifications:
   

  




* Azure Solutions Architect Expert or GCP/AWS Certified Solutions Architect
* TOGAF or equivalent EA framework certification
* Cisco, VMware, or retail technology certifications



  

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

***Please note***
 : As our culture and teamwork are very important to us, four days (80%) per week of in-office presence in our office are required.
   

  





 This is a full-time position with placement in
 **Stockholm** 
 .
   

  





  

  





**WHO WE ARE:**
  

 Shaping the future of fashion with people, data, and tech. The fashion and retail industries are going through a transformation, driven by customers' technology and sustainability expectations. At H&M Group, we want to shape the future of fashion and lifestyle by harnessing the power of smart tech and data. With our 74-year history of innovation, we understand the need to collaborate and co-create with engineers and tech specialists around the world to achieve our vision.
   

  





  

  





**WHAT WE OFFER!** 
  

  

 You are joining a unique value-driven culture, a large tech network and community where you can be yourself. Besides the obvious perks such as staff discount card, flexible work life, learning communities, wellness benefits, parental benefits etc. There are endless opportunities to experiment and grow in any direction that you want, and when you grow, we grow. Being a major player gives us countless opportunities to make a real impact and shape the future.

title: V.I.E. Innovation and Intrapreneurship
description:
Req ID: 518722
   

  

 At Alstom, we understand transport networks and what moves people. From high-speed trains, metros, monorails, and trams, to turnkey systems, services, infrastructure, signalling and digital mobility, we offer our diverse customers the broadest portfolio in the industry. Every day, more than 80 000 colleagues lead the way to greener and smarter mobility worldwide, connecting cities as we reduce carbon and replace cars.
   

  

 Type of contract: Volontariat International en Entreprise (VIE). To learn more about the VIE program and the eligibility requirements, please, Mon Volontariat International
   

  

 Could you be the full-time Innovation Programme Leader in Sweden we’re looking for?
   

  

**Your future role**
 Take on a new challenge and apply your engineering and project management expertise in a cutting-edge field. You’ll work alongside dynamic and forward-thinking teammates.
   

  

 You'll play a pivotal role in driving innovation and sustainability initiatives, ensuring the successful delivery of high-priority projects. Day-to-day, you’ll work closely with teams across the business (R&D, engineering, and external innovation partners), coordinate technical activities, and manage stakeholder relationships, among other responsibilities.
   

  

 You’ll specifically take care of leading advanced manufacturing and eco-material projects, but also ensuring alignment with Alstom's long-term sustainability and innovation goals.
   

  

 We’ll look to you for:
   

  

* Driving use cases through the Acceleration phase in line with Alstom’s Collaborative Innovation Programme
* Defining and managing project scope, milestones, deliverables, risks, and dependencies
* Coordinating engineering activities such as mechanical design, structural simulations, and benchmarking
* Ensuring compliance with railway engineering constraints while leveraging innovative manufacturing capabilities
* Acting as the operational interface with start-ups and internal contributors
* Preparing and animating technical workshops, design reviews, and steering points
* Providing clear status reporting and supporting go/no-go decisions


 Ensuring documentation, confidentiality, and IP awareness in line with contractual requirements
   

  

**All About You**
 We value passion and attitude over experience. That’s why we don’t expect you to have every single skill. Instead, we’ve listed some that we think will help you succeed and grow in this role:
   

  

* Master’s degree in Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Materials, or equivalent
* Solid understanding of structural mechanics, manufacturing processes, and product development
* Experience or understanding of technical or engineering project management in an industrial or R&D environment
* Knowledge of innovation acceleration, prototype development, or pre-industrial processes
* Familiarity with railway, automotive, aerospace, or heavy industries
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
* Structured, autonomous, and delivery-focused mindset


 You don’t need to be a train enthusiast to thrive with us. We guarantee that when you step onto one of our trains with your friends or family, you’ll be proud. If you’re up for the challenge, we’d love to hear from you!
   

  

**Important to note**
 As a global business, we’re an equal-opportunity employer that celebrates diversity across the 63 countries we operate in. We’re committed to creating an inclusive workplace for everyone.

title: Senior Data Engineer - Data Platform Team
description:
10% of Europe's CO₂ emissions are caused by residential heating, and energy bills are out of control. Aira is here to change that.
   

  

 With our intelligent Aira Heat Pump at the heart, we're making the switch to clean energy-tech easier and more affordable. Helping Europe turn off gas and slashing energy costs one home at a time.
   

  

 Founded in 2022, and with 1000+ employees and counting, Aira is driving the clean energy revolution by providing homes with modern clean energy-tech solutions such as solar power, battery storage solutions and heat pumps. With a state-of-the-art production facility in Poland, an HQ in Stockholm, Sweden, and hubs across the UK, Germany, and Italy, Aira is well on track to install clean energy-tech into 5 million homes by 2034.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a Data Engineer to join our Data Analytics and ML team. We are looking for somebody who can continue building, improving, expanding and maintaining our data infrastructure and central back-end, from GCP fundamentals to collaborating with tech teams to set up their data serving pipelines, to enabling analytics engineers and domain experts to build data marts, dashboarding and data science efforts.
   

  

 You are responsible for enabling other data experts in their developer experience, ensuring our data core platform is secure, stable and scalable, can run necessary pipelines for streaming and other sources, and serve data to other engineers or analysts in a reliable, compliant and convenient way.
   

  

 Your work will be key to optimising the reliability and performance of our organisation and the different teams. You will build and maintain our data landscape, drive change in our tech and development processes, engineer solutions to enhance features, and be a part of our data architecture to propel solutions to further levels.
   

  

 Your other responsibilities include:
   

  

  

* Enable data- and AI-driven software, insights and informed decisions through enabling data product building in an interoperable, agile and modern fashion
* Build components to enable data mesh distributed ownership of data assets, pipelines and analytics marts
* Develop end-to-end pipelines to ingest, transform and serve data assets
* Collaborate with analytics engineers, enabling them to move fast and efficiently in developing and managing data products based on raw source data
* Collaborate with software product development teams to allow them to to have autonomy in serving and consuming data in the landscape
* Introduce practices and tools to improve data reliability and performance
* Ingest crucial data to adjust future business strategies


**Who Are You**
 From a technical perspective, we would like you to have experience with:
   

  

  

* Data engineering, infrastructure as code, and building data pipelines and pipeline modules
* Streaming data, Kafka, schema registry
* Creating ELT/ETL pipelines for ingesting and transforming data
* Building, testing, and maintaining database and pipeline architectures
* Dagster, DBT, DLT, GCP, AWS
* Python, SQL, Java, Terraform
* GitHub CICD and deployment pipelines
* Kubernetes
* Lint and other code hygiene CI practices
* Data/analytics/ML in any major cloud platform


**As a person, we would like you to be:**
* Adaptable and hands-on solution while taking into account/having an interest for the holistic perspective
* A quick learner with a willingness to share knowledge
* A strong communicator and team player


 At Aira, we champion the next-generation energy as well as diversity and inclusion. We firmly believe that a diverse workforce fosters innovation and creativity, enhancing our ability to serve customers and communities effectively. We welcome individuals from all backgrounds, cultures, and perspectives to join our team. Our commitment is to uphold equality and inclusivity, fostering a collaborative environment where everyone can thrive and contribute to a better future for our people and the planet.

title: Skadereglerare
description:
**Om Carla**
 Vi på Carla vill sätta en ny standard för hur man köper bil. Vårt mål är att det ska vara lika lätt och tryggt att köpa och sälja bil online som allt annat man köper på nätet. Självklart ska alla bilar vara laddbara och vi strävar efter att fler människor ska kunna uppleva fördelarna med att köra elektriskt. Därför har vi skapat det säkraste, mest bekväma och transparenta sättet att sälja, köpa eller leasa en elbil på.
   

  

 Vi grundades år 2020 i Stockholm och befinner oss i en spännande tillväxtfas.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som
 **Skadereglerare** 
 hos Carla får du en
 **nyckelroll** 
 i vårt arbete att säkerställa kvalitet, kostnadskontroll och effektiva reparationsprocesser inom garanti- och försäkringsärenden till högsta möjliga service.
   

  

 Du kommer främst att arbeta med så kallade "rödflagg-ärenden". Ärenden som i sin natur är av mer komplex karaktär och eskalerats inom kundservicefunktionen.
   

  

 Rollen innebär att du granskar underlag i form av felbeskrivning, bilder, offerter och fakturor. Utmanar verkstäder, garantiutfärdare samt försäkringsgivare och säkerställer rätt åtgärd till rätt kostnad.
   

  

 Det här är en
 **specialistroll** 
 för dig som gillar att kombinera branschspecifik teknisk expertis med analys, problemlösning och affärsmässighet.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära interna supportteam och rapporterar till vår Logistics & Support Manager.
   

  

**Dina Huvudsakliga Arbetsuppgifter Kommer Att Omfatta**
* Granskning och bedömning av offerter och fakturor från samarbetspartners
* Löpande dialog med verkstäder, garantiutfärdare och försäkringsbolag
* Rekommendera åtgärder och alternativa lösningar baserat på tekniskt underlag
* Arbeta strukturerat enligt interna processer och checklistor


**Vi söker dig som**
 Har en gedigen teknisk bakgrund inom fordonsbranschen och trivs i en roll där du får fatta beslut, analysera komplexa ärenden och utmana befintliga lösningar. Både internt och gentemot externa parter.
   

  

**Vi tror att du har**
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet från bilverkstad
* Erfarenhet som diagnostekniker
* Erfarenhet från auktoriserad verkstad eller egen verkstad
* God teknisk förståelse och kunskap om reparationsmetoder
* Erfarenhet av system som Autodata och Partslink24 eller liknande
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och fatta tydliga beslut
* Besitter en hög grad av trygghet i att stå på dig i tekniska diskussioner


 Som person är du analytisk, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad. Du gillar att arbeta i ett högt tempo och har ett starkt kvalitets- och kostnadsfokus. Du är öppensinnad och trivs i en verksamhet med högt tempo, höga förväntningar och ser möjligheter samt kommer med förslag för ständiga förbättringar.
   

  

**Vad Carla erbjuder dig**
 Du får chansen att vara en del av ett växande företag med starka värderingar och en hållbar affärsmodell. Vi erbjuder en dynamisk arbetsmiljö där förändringar välkomnas och där din vilja att utvecklas och förbättras värderas högt. Du kommer att få möjlighet att påverka och skapa din egen karriärväg på ett nystartat bolag med engagerade och skickliga kollegor. Vi tror starkt på mångfald och välkomnar sökande från alla bakgrunder
   

  

**Omfattning och placering**
* Heltid, provanställning i 6 månader
* Arbetstider: 8-17 / 09-18 måndag till fredag
* Placering: Carlas kontor i Stockholm


 Låter detta som en utmaning för dig? Tveka inte att ansöka idag! Urval och rekrytering sker löpande, så skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.

title: Enhteschef Tjänsteutveckling
description:
På Migrationsverket arbetar vi med en av vår tids stora samhällsfrågor – migrationen. Totalt är vi cirka 6 000 personer här, och vi har ett ovanligt viktigt jobb!

#### **Vissa chefsjobb handlar om förvaltning. Det här handlar om att bygga framtidens utvecklingsorganisation.**


Migrationsverket investerar långsiktigt i digital utveckling och står inför en omfattande resa där vi stärker våra team, utvecklar våra arbetssätt och skapar ännu bättre digitala tjänster för människor, företag och myndigheter.

**Nu söker vi en enhetschef som vill vara med och forma framtidens utvecklingsorganisation på Migrationsverket.**


Om du drivs av att utveckla människor, bygga högpresterande team och skapa förutsättningar för modern systemutveckling kan detta vara ditt nästa uppdrag.

**Om rollen**


Som enhetschef leder du en utvecklingsenhet med cirka 15 medarbetare och ett antal konsulter. I enheten finns kompetenser inom bland annat systemutveckling, kravanalys, UX, arkitektur och produktledning.


Ditt viktigaste uppdrag är att skapa förutsättningar för att människor och team ska lyckas. Du leder genom andra, bygger engagemang, utvecklar kompetens och säkerställer att enheten har rätt förmågor för att möta både dagens och morgondagens behov.


Du blir en del av sektionen för tjänsteutveckling som ansvarar för utvecklingen av flera av Migrationsverkets mest verksamhetskritiska digitala tjänster. Här arbetar utvecklingsteam nära verksamheten för att skapa lösningar som gör verklig skillnad för både användare och medarbetare.


Vi arbetar aktivt för att stärka det tvärfunktionella arbetssättet och föra verksamhet och IT ännu närmare varandra. Som enhetschef spelar du en viktig roll i den utvecklingen genom att skapa tydlig riktning, bygga starka team och bidra till en kultur präglad av samarbete, lärande och kontinuerlig förbättring.


Du ingår i sektionens ledningsgrupp och förväntas bidra till utvecklingen av hela verksamheten – inte bara din egen enhet. Tillsammans med övriga chefer ansvarar du för att utveckla organisationens leveransförmåga, arbetssätt och långsiktiga kompetensförsörjning.


Migrationsverkets utvecklingsorganisation växer och rekrytering, kompetensutveckling och onboarding av nya medarbetare kommer att vara viktiga delar av uppdraget under de kommande åren.

**Därför väljer många ledare att arbeta hos oss**  

Hos oss får du kombinera modern systemutveckling med ett tydligt samhällsuppdrag.


Du får möjlighet att:

* leda kompetenta specialistteam i en stor och komplex utvecklingsmiljö
* bidra till utvecklingen av digitala tjänster som används i verksamheter med stor betydelse för samhället
* påverka hur vi organiserar, utvecklar och leder framtidens utvecklingsorganisation
* arbeta nära verksamheten och se konkreta resultat av utvecklingsarbetet
* utveckla människor, team och arbetssätt tillsammans med engagerade chefskollegor
* verka i en organisation där långsiktighet, stabilitet och samhällsnytta kombineras med utveckling och förändring

**Vi söker dig som**  

är en trygg och tydlig ledare med förmåga att skapa riktning, engagemang och resultat.


Du har erfarenhet av att leda inom IT och förstår de möjligheter och utmaningar som finns i moderna utvecklingsorganisationer. Du behöver inte vara den främsta tekniska specialisten i rummet, men du har tillräcklig förståelse för systemutveckling för att kunna vara en relevant ledare, kravställare och samtalspartner.


Du drivs av att utveckla människor och team och ser ledarskapet som ett verktyg för att skapa resultat genom andra. Du har förmåga att kombinera ett strategiskt perspektiv med operativ handlingskraft och trivs i miljöer där utveckling och förändring är en naturlig del av vardagen.


Som person är du prestigelös, nyfiken och samarbetsorienterad. Du bygger förtroende genom tydlig kommunikation, goda relationer och ett tillitsbaserat ledarskap.


Som statstjänsteman förväntas du också ha gott omdöme samt en hög säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Vi kommer att lägga stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och ditt ledarskap.

**Du har**

* akademisk examen inom IT, datavetenskap eller annat område som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant, alternativt motsvarande kompetens förvärvad genom arbetslivserfarenhet
* erfarenhet av att leda och utveckla medarbetare och verksamhet inom IT-området
* erfarenhet av arbete med systemutveckling eller systemutvecklingsnära verksamhet
* erfarenhet av planering och resursstyrning utifrån verksamhetsbehov, kompetens och ekonomi
* flerårig erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt
* god förmåga att uttrycka dig på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift
* svenskt medborgarskap

**Det är meriterande om du har**

* chefserfarenhet inom IT-området
* gedigen erfarenhet av systemutveckling
* erfarenhet av arbete i större och komplexa organisationer
* erfarenhet av produktägarskap eller produktstyrning inom IT
* erfarenhet av förändringsledning, organisationsutveckling eller verksamhetsutveckling

**Upplysningar**


Placering: Norrköping, Linköping eller Stockholm  

Möjlighet till distansarbete: Ja, delvis utifrån verksamhetens behov  

Anställning: Heltid, tillsvidareanställning  

Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse  

Sista ansökningsdatum: Vi gör urval löpande men vi vill ha din ansökan senast den 28 Juni


Läs mer om våra förmåner här – Om Migrationsverket Förmåner och villkor

*Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) kan komma att genomföras. Tjänsten ställer krav på svenskt medborgarskap.*

**Hos oss får du möjlighet att göra skillnad – både för människor och för framtidens digitala samhällstjänster.Är du den ledare vi söker? Då ser vi fram emot din ansökan.**


Välkommen med din ansökan!

Vi välkomnar därför alla sökande och strävar efter en jämn könsfördelning och mångfald. Som statlig myndighet rekryterar vi efter förtjänst och skicklighet. På arbetsgivarverket.se kan du läsa mer om vad det innebär. Du behöver inte bifoga något personligt brev med din ansökan, men vi önskar att du svarar så tydlig ochutförligt som möjligt på urvalsfrågorna för att vi ska kunna göra en rättvis bedömning av din erfarenhet om du är kvalificerad att gå vidare i rekryteringen eller inte. I vissa rekryteringar använder vi också tester för att bedöma hur väl din skicklighet stämmer överens med tjänsten du söker. Vid en eventuell intervju kan du även få svara på frågor kopplat till säkerhet. Vill du komma i kontakt med fackliga företrädare finns kontaktuppgifter till Saco-S, Seko och ST längst ned på sidan ”Lediga jobb och intresseanmälan” på migrationsverket.se: Frågor och svar om att söka jobb på Migrationsverket För att arbeta på Migrationsverket behöver du ha rätt att vistas och arbeta i Sverige på någon av dessa grunder: svenskt medborgarskap (krav för vissa tjänster), nordiskt medborgarskap, EU-medborgarskap eller permanent uppehållstillstånd. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter, eller annan information som du själv bedömer som skyddsvärd, ska du kontakta rekrytering@migrationsverket.se innan du gör din ansökan så berättar vi mer om våra säkerhetsrutiner. Migrationsverkets behandling av personuppgifter Migrationsverkets rekryteringar sker helt i vår egen eller upphandlade leverantörers regi. Vi ber därför om att inte få telefonsamtal och mejl från rekryteringsföretag och annonsförsäljare.

title: Product Designer
description:
**TL;DR** 
 - We’re looking for world-class product designers to help shape Lovable. You’ll lead projects end-to-end, collaborating closely with engineering. We expect a broad range of design skills, and exceptional taste. You’ll join a team at the forefront of AI, enabling anyone to create software.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Lovable-built applications and websites are visited hundreds of millions of times a month, and our enterprise footprint is compounding fast. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* A track record of working in high performing, fast-paced startup environments
* A portfolio showcasing successful product work loved by users and produced in high-velocity teams
* Talent for simplifying complicated user journeys into intuitive experiences
* Strong prototyping abilities with emphasis on clear visual communication
* Fluency with design systems and technical implementations
* Outstanding command of visual design, UI patterns, and interaction principles
* High aptitude for shipping and learning extraordinarily quickly
* Bonus: You ship to production, perhaps with a little help from AI
* Bonus: Experience designing AI products


**What You’ll Do**
**In one sentence:** 
 Design Lovable, making it the most Lovable piece of software ever.
   

  

* Craft detailed user flows and high-fidelity mockups for new features
* Own design projects from conception to delivery, collaborating with engineering or ideally implementing yourself with AI (we'll train you)
* Be scrappy and hands on with any design assets needed
* Establish scalable design processes that uphold quality standards

title: Product Manager
description:
At Billogram, we believe it always pays off to treat people well. That’s why we’ve built a payment platform that covers the full lifecycle, from the first payment to full resolution. We make money when our clients’ customers pay on time, not from the friction when they don’t. Whether it’s recurring payments, consumer invoicing, or enterprise billing, the principle is the same: one platform, designed to keep payments working and relationships growing.
 



  





 As we continue to evolve our product organization, we are looking for a Product Manager to join our team in Stockholm.
 



  





**About the role:** 




 As a Product Manager at Billogram, your mission is to deliver real value for both our customers and our business. You will lead the development of the core parts of the recipient experience, including invoice distribution, email communication, web invoice design, and smart dunning flows.
 



  





 In this role, you own the most critical touchpoints where our product meets the end-user. Success here requires more than just shipping features; it’s about using data and customer insights to ensure that every part of the journey is optimized for conversion and a great user experience. Collaborating closely with engineers in your team, other product teams, and departments, you’ll align priorities and drive cross-functional success to move the needle on our most important metrics.
 



  





**Primary responsibilities:** 



* **Optimize the End-User Experience:** 
 Drive the development of our invoice distribution, email flows, and web invoice design to ensure maximum conversion and user satisfaction.
* **Champion Data-Driven Discovery:** 
 Implement tracking and lead A/B testing to move from assumptions to validated insights.
* **Strategic & Operational Balance:** 
 Lead your team through product discovery while also being hands-on in managing incidents and operational excellence.
* **Business Impact:** 
 Understand how your part of the product contributes to Billogram's revenue and use that business acumen to prioritize the most valuable initiatives.
* **AI Integration:** 
 Use AI in your daily work to automate research and prototyping, while continuously refining your expertise to ensure Billogram remains at the forefront of AI-driven product management.



  





**What we are looking for:** 




 You value progress over perfection, understanding that great products are built through continuous learning and smart iterations. You have a natural urge to get to the bottom of things and use data to navigate through the noise. For you, success is defined by actual impact on the business and our users, rather than the volume of features delivered.
 



  





 Navigating ambiguity comes naturally to you, and you take full ownership of your area, staying proactive even when responsibility is unclear. As a skilled communicator, you find it easy to align people toward a common goal, whether discussing technical logic or commercial value. You are also curious about how the PM role is evolving and enjoy exploring new tools, such as AI, to enhance your way of working.
 



  





**Skills & traits which will help you succeed in this role:** 



* **Product Management Expertise:** 
 Minimum of 3 years of documented experience in leading both discovery and delivery processes with a focus on creating measurable value.
* **Payment Experience:** 
 Prior experience with payment solutions such as card payments, Open Banking, digital billing, dunning flows, or debt collection is a strong advantage.
* **Cross-functional Collaboration:** 
 A proven ability to build bridges between engineering, design, and commercial teams to foster alignment and deliver high-value outcomes.
* **Data-driven Mindset:** 
 Experience in using customer insights and metrics to guide decisions and track product success.
* **Communication:** 
 Fluency in written and spoken English is required. Fluency in Swedish is a plus.
* **Relevant Background:** 
 Experience from FinTech, regulated businesses, or a fast-growing start-up or scale-up environment is highly beneficial.



  





**Why work with us?** 




 At Billogram we promise you an exciting journey as we break into new markets and grow at a rapid pace. That aside you will get lots of freedom and opportunity to develop together with great colleagues at our office, right in the center of Stockholm. We also offer flexible working hours, exciting challenges and a whole lot of laughs.
 



  





 We're committed to your long-term development, offering clear career progression paths. You'll also enjoy a fantastic benefits package, including 30 (+2) days of holiday, an occupational pension, a generous wellness allowance, sick leave top-up, and parental leave compensation. At Billogram, our inclusive and diverse culture ensures that everyone can enjoy a fulfilling career and a great work-life balance.
 



  





*At Billogram, we provide equal opportunities and strive for an inclusive and diverse environment. All applicants will be considered for employment without attention to gender, transgender identity or expression, ethnicity, religion or other beliefs, disability, sexual orientation, or age.* 




 Welcome to the world of Billogram!

title: Senior IT Security Architect
description:
We are now looking for a Senior IT Security Architect who wants to play a key role in helping our customers build resilient, modern, and business-aligned security architectures. With us, you will work at the forefront of cybersecurity alongside some of the industry’s leading specialists — in a company with a strong expert profile, a solid culture, and international reach.
  
This role is for someone highly senior who understands that good security architecture is not only about controls and technology, but about creating customer value: reducing risk, enabling transformation, supporting compliance, improving decision-making, and building solutions that remain effective over time.
  
You are expected to take ownership of the bigger picture, challenge stakeholders at the right level, build trust in executive-level discussions, and at the same time possess sufficient technical depth to make sound architectural decisions.
  
  

**Example of responsibilities:**  

Lead and drive security architecture initiatives in complex customer environments
  
  

Develop target architectures, current-state assessments, gap analyses, and transformation roadmaps
  
  

Advise customers on Zero Trust strategy and architecture, including identity-centric security, segmentation, least privilege, continuous verification, and secure access
  
  

Design security architectures for hybrid environments, datacenters, networks, identity, endpoints, applications, and cloud services
  
  

Support customers in architectural matters related to AWS, Azure, and GCP
  
  

Ensure that security solutions support business objectives, risk management, and regulatory requirements
  
  

Facilitate workshops, lead design decisions, and prepare decision-making material for both technical and business-oriented stakeholders
  
  

Act as a strategic advisor to CISOs, IT leadership, architecture boards, and projects/programs
  
  

Contribute to the continued development of our offerings, methodologies, and best practices within security architecture
  
  

Your Profile
  
We are looking for someone clearly senior, with many years of experience in security architecture, complex IT environments, and advisory work toward customers or larger internal organizations. You are confident in your expertise, comfortable taking ownership, and capable of connecting technology, risk, and business value.
  
  

**We believe you have:**  

Extensive experience working as a Security Architect, Enterprise Architect with a security focus, or a similar senior advisory role
  
  

Strong understanding of security architecture across several of the following areas: Zero Trust, IAM/PAM, network security, cloud security, hybrid architecture, endpoint security, application security, data protection, and logging/monitoring
  
  

Proven experience translating security requirements and risks into concrete architectural decisions and actionable plans
  
  

The ability to lead workshops, facilitate decisions, and build alignment between technical and business stakeholders
  
  

Strong consultative skills and a deep understanding of how security creates customer value
  
  

Experience working with strategies, target architectures, governing principles, reference architectures, and roadmap initiatives
  
  

Good understanding of cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, and/or GCP
  
  

Meritorious Qualifications
  
  

Certifications such as CISSP, SABSA, CISM, CCSP, TOGAF, Azure/AWS Security certifications, or similar
  
  

Experience from regulated industries or critical infrastructure environments
  
  

Knowledge of security frameworks and standards such as NIST CSF, ISO 27001, CIS Controls, or similar
  
  

Experience with SASE/SSE, microsegmentation, identity federation, or modern access control
  
  

Experience supporting customers in large-scale transformation initiatives or security programs
  
  

Why Orange Cyberdefense?
  
There are many employers within IT and security. But few are as clearly focused on cybersecurity as we are. At Orange Cyberdefense, you do not just get a new assignment — you become part of an environment where your expertise is taken seriously, continuously developed, and applied where it makes the greatest impact.
  
  

**With us, you will:**  

Work in a dedicated cybersecurity company with deep specialist expertise and a strong market position
  
  

Be close to some of the industry’s most complex and interesting assignments, where security is business-critical
  
  

Collaborate with highly experienced colleagues in architecture, advisory, SOC, incident response, offensive security, and managed services
  
  

Continuously develop through training, certifications, knowledge sharing, and professional exchange
  
  

Make a real impact — both in customer engagements and in how we develop our services and ways of working
  
  

Work in a Challenger culture where initiative, accountability, and ideas are encouraged
  
  

Have colleagues who are passionate about cybersecurity, support each other, and generously share knowledge
  
  

**Contribute to something bigger:** building a safer digital society

title: AWS Marketing Manager, Europe North, AWS, Europe North Marketing
description:
**Description**
 Amazon Web Services Europe North (Nordics, Benelux and Baltics) is seeking a results-driven Account-Based Marketing (ABM) Manager to design and execute high-impact ABM programs for enterprise customers within a designated field territory. This role combines strategic thinking with hands-on execution to drive measurable business outcomes through targeted marketing initiatives.
   

  

 The Account-Based Marketing Manager will own the end-to-end execution of territory ABM programs, working backwards from customer needs to create data-driven, multi-channel campaigns that accelerate pipeline and revenue growth. This role requires strong project management skills, analytical capabilities, and the ability to influence cross-functional stakeholders.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Design and execute territory-specific ABM campaigns (1:1, 1:few) that align with global frameworks and drive measurable business impact
* Partner with sales teams to translate account priorities into effective marketing programs
* Analyze customer data, buying signals, and market trends to inform campaign strategy and optimization
* Execute multi-channel programs (events, digital, direct) that deliver personalized account experiences
* Partner with regional marketing teams to ensure ABM programs complement broader field marketing efforts
* Drive operational excellence through standardized processes, documentation, and best practices
* Track and report on program performance, using data to optimize and scale successful approaches
* Manage program budgets effectively, demonstrating frugality while maximizing impact
* Collaborate with global ABM community to share learnings and adopt proven practices


**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences
