title: Sales Manager HPE Networking
description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Job Family Definition:**
 Leads the sales team to drive growth and profitability. Builds a high-performing team, manages sales execution and forecasting, and strengthens customer and partner relationships. Supports complex deals and drives pipeline growth aligned with HPE strategy.
   

  

**Management Level Definition**
 Manages a sales team and is accountable for results (revenue, people, operations). Provides guidance, drives execution, and supports team development. Typically reports to Director level.
   

  

**Additional Guidance/criteria**
* Manages and controls activities within a single country (Sweden)
* Manages a team of ~8–15 people


**Responsibilities**
**Managing the Business:**
* Sales coverage – Build targeted business plans and allocate resources to drive sales and margins; collaborate across teams to prioritize and direct activities.
* Account planning – Support sales strategy and processes; align account plans with corporate strategy; manage geography plans to meet revenue targets; ensure accurate forecasting, progress tracking, and regular reviews.
* Pipeline management – Build, track, and manage a healthy pipeline (short and long term); monitor size, quality, and win/loss performance.
* Deal management – Review deals to ensure quality and smooth execution; track deal progress and governance.
* Business acumen – Apply business, financial, and legal understanding to improve performance and align operations with company direction.
* Strategic sales planning & implementation – Develop and execute sales strategies to grow market share and drive profitable growth.
* Competitive positioning – Use market insights to strengthen positioning and counter competitors in customer engagements.


**Leading & Managing Sales People**
* Coaching & performance management – Manage and develop team performance; support individuals through challenges and drive results across all performers.
* Leadership – Lead by example; motivate and support teams in winning and closing deals.
* People development – Drive skill development to increase team productivity and impact.
* Change management – Lead the team effectively through change and transformation.
* Attract and hire top talent to the team


**Selling As a Sales Manager**
* Strategic direction – Align team activities with company strategy and support solution positioning based on customer needs.
* C-level engagement – Build strong relationships with senior customer stakeholders and decision-makers.
* Consultative selling – Coach teams on identifying and advancing opportunities; support client engagements and ensure access to the right resources.
* Industry & client knowledge – Stay up to date on market trends and customer challenges; position solutions aligned to business needs.


**Your Profile**
**Education and Experience Required:**
* Proven sales leadership experience with strong results
* Project management skills
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent
* 7+ years experience in IT sales
* Fluency in both English and Swedish are required


**Knowledge And Skills**
* Business Management: Proven ability to execute sales strategy and manage pipeline, forecasting, and overall performance
* Sales Development: Demonstrated experience in mobilizing resources, driving sales execution, growing key accounts, and hiring top talent
* Workforce Management & Development: Strong people management skills, including performance management, coaching, and team development
* Customer Engagement: Proven ability to build strong customer relationships and drive high levels of customer satisfaction
* Strategic Business Planning: Experience managing revenue and margins, with a focus on identifying and driving strategic growth opportunities
* Sales Team / Individual Coaching: Strong coaching and mentoring capabilities; ability to support deals, align team priorities, and drive results


**Additional Skills**
 Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Assertiveness, Bias, Building Rapport, Buyer Personas, Coaching, Complex Sales, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Customer Experience Strategy, Customer Interactions, Design Thinking, Empathy, Financial Acumen, Follow-Through, Growth Mindset, Identifying Sales Opportunities, Industry Knowledge, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity {+ 6 more}
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health & Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal & Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.

title: Partnerships Manager
description:
Europe's public institutions serve hundreds of millions of people, and most lack the AI infrastructure to do it well.
 **Intric is changing that.** 
 Our sovereign AI platform is already used by 60+ municipalities, governments, and institutions. We have established a leading position in Sweden, and are expanding across Europe. And now we're looking for
 **our first Partnerships Manager to** 
**build the distribution channel that gets Intric into Europe's most critical organizations.**
**Role Overview**
 We've built a strong direct sales motion in Sweden and are expanding into new European markets. But direct sales alone won't capture the full opportunity. Across Europe, the organizations that need Intric most, municipalities, public agencies, defense-adjacent industries, critical infrastructure operators, often procure technology through established partners, not cold outreach.
   

  

 This role is about unlocking that channel. You'll identify and sign distribution partners: IT resellers, system integrators, and consulting firms that already have trusted relationships with governments and other critical industry clients. Your goal is to turn them into effective sellers and advocates for Intric — a new, significant revenue channel that complements our direct GTM.
   

  

 It's a blank-page role. No existing partner list, no playbook to follow. You'll work directly with our Head of GTM and founders to define the strategy, sign the first deals, and build the enablement programs that make partners successful.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 You will play a key role in building Intric's European distribution network and opening a new sales channel. This includes:
   

  

* Map and prioritize distribution partners across Europe (resellers, SIs, and consulting firms) who serve public sector and critical industry clients
* Lead outreach, negotiation, and signing of channel and distribution agreements
* Build partner onboarding and enablement — ensuring partners can position and sell Intric effectively
* Collaborate closely with the direct sales team to align on strategy, share pipeline, and avoid channel conflict
* Develop and maintain senior relationships with key partners across multiple European markets
* Identify partnership opportunities in both public and private sector including strategic alliances with organizations that open access to new customer segments


**Who You Are**
* You've spent a few years in partnerships, a channel-facing commercial role, or a relevant area within management consulting, and you've learned how to navigate complex, multi-stakeholder organizations
* You're energized by building from zero, you don't wait for a warm list or a proven playbook
* You understand what makes a distribution partnership work: what motivates a reseller, how to structure a deal, and how to keep a partner engaged
* You're comfortable selling a new concept to a skeptical partner who's never heard of Intric
* You are drawn to Intric’s mission to bring secure, sovereign and easy-to-use AI to Europe’s most critical institutions
* Fluent in English; additional European languages are a plus


**Why Join Intric**
* Rapid career development in a fast-growing AI company
* Competitive compensation package including stock options
* High ownership and influence
* Work with a mission-driven and ambitious team


**Practical Information**
 Location: Stockholm HQ
   

  

 Travel expectations: Regular travel across Europe expected
   

  

 Language requirements: English required; Swedish or other European languages are a plus
   

  

**Culture at Intric**
 At Intric, we are building a secure AI foundation for governments and enterprises. We tackle meaningful challenges with care, responsibility, and focus on real-world impact. Our team is ambitious, collaborative, and values independent thinking as well as constructive discussion.
   

  

 We believe in taking ownership, focusing on outcomes, maintaining high standards of quality and integrity, continuously learning, and working closely together. Titles matter less than contribution, and every team member has the chance to shape how we grow and succeed.
   

  

 As Intric expands across Europe, you will be part of shaping the company and its culture. If you are motivated to take initiative and make an impact, you will thrive here.
   

  

**Apply**
 We review applications continuously and look forward to hearing from you.

title: Senior SW Engineer - C++ on Embedded Linux
description:

 är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion.  Vi söker nu en
 **Senior SW Engineer - C++ on Embedded Linux**

**Om uppdraget**
 Vi söker en erfaren C++-utvecklare till ett team som arbetar med applikationsutveckling för avancerade handhållna embedded-produkter. Du blir en del av ett större utvecklingssammanhang där denna roll hör hemma i applikationsteamet.

 ASAP

 Nej

 12 months

 2026-06-14

title: Head of Analytics till Humana
description:
*Vill du leda utvecklingen av en modern dataplattform och omsätta data till verksamhetskritiska insikter? Söker du en strategisk och operativ roll där du får påverka, bygga och driva analytics framåt i en organisation med ett viktigt samhällsuppdrag? Då kan detta vara nästa steg i din karriär.*
**OM ROLLEN**
 I rollen som Head of Analytics får du ett övergripande ansvar för att vidareutveckla organisationens dataplattform, BI-lösningar och integrationer. Du leder ett team om sju specialister och arbetar både strategiskt och operativt – från arkitektur och kravställning till datamodellering och rapportutveckling.
   

  

 Du samarbetar nära ekonomifunktionen och andra delar av verksamheten, där du fungerar som ett tekniskt och analytiskt stöd i allt från finansiell rapportering till bredare affärsinsikter. Rollen innebär också ansvar för integrationsplattformen och att säkerställa effektiva och hållbara dataflöden.
   

  

 Organisationen befinner sig i en moderniseringsresa där du får en nyckelroll i att forma framtidens dataarkitektur och arbetssätt. Ni arbetar med moderna teknologier som Python (Polars, FastAPI), Airflow och Google Cloud, med fokus på skalbara och datadrivna lösningar.
   

  

**DIN PROFIL**
* Flera års erfarenhet inom dataanalys, BI eller analytics
* Erfarenhet av datamodellering och datalager
* Van att arbeta med SQL och strukturerad data
* Erfarenhet av datavisualisering och dashboards
* Erfarenhet av att leda team eller projekt
* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom data, IT, ekonomi eller motsvarande
* God förståelse för moderna dataplattformar och verktyg
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska


 Du är en trygg och engagerad ledare som motiverar och utvecklar ditt team. Med en strukturerad och kvalitetsmedveten arbetsstil har du förmåga att omsätta komplex data till tydliga och affärsdrivna insikter. Du är kommunikativ och trivs i en roll med många kontaktytor där du bygger förtroende i organisationen.
   

  

**OM ORGANISATIONEN**
 Humana erbjuder tjänster inom personlig assistans, individ- och familjeomsorg, äldreomsorg och bostäder med särskild service enligt LSS, Lagen om stöd och service för vissa funktionshindrade. Humana har 20 000 engagerade medarbetare i Sverige, Norge, Danmark och Finland som utför omsorgstjänster till över 9 000 människor. Vi har en prestigelös arbetsmiljö där vi uppmuntrar varandra till delaktighet och att sprida glädje på jobbet. Här drivs vi av utveckling och arbetar ständigt för att förbättra kvaliteten i vår verksamhet, där du som medarbetare är en viktig del i detta arbete.
   

  

**DIN ANSÖKAN**
*I denna rekrytering samarbetar företaget* 

*med Wise.
   

  

 Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mail, utan du söker enkelt med ditt CV eller din LinkedIn-profil på* 
***wise.se***
*. Vi använder kompetensbaserad rekrytering som metod. Det gör vi i vår strävan efter en mer potentialbaserad matchning. Vi ser därför gärna sökanden med olika bakgrunder, åldrar och erfarenheter, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och gör oss bättre och smartare som organisation.
   

  

 Har du frågor om processen eller rollen? Kontakta då ansvarig rekryteringskonsult* 
***Anja Widell,***
***anja.widell@wise.se***
***.***
*Vi intervjuar löpande så rollen kan tillsättas före sista ansökningsdatum.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!*

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
**Att jobba som Azure DevOps specialist**
 Som Azure DevOps Specialist kommer du att ha en viktig roll i att möjliggöra effektiva, säkra och skalbara leveransflöden inom våra utvecklingsplattformar. Tillsammans med teamet är du med och utvecklar Skandias bygg- och leveransförmåga genom hela DevSecOps-kedjan – från kod till test som drift. Du har ett nära samarbete med våra utvecklingsteam, arkitekter och interna driftorganisation där du bidrar till vår fortsatta automationsresa genom att kvalitetssäkra, optimera och utveckla Azure DevOps som plattform inte generell DevOps.
   

  

 I din vardag kommer fokus att ligga på att bygga skalbara lösningar för Skandias utvecklingsteam och möjliggöra release on demand. Teamet jobbar med att sätta upp ramverk, governance, policies och skapa förutsättningar för att flera team ska använda Azure DevOps som verktyg. Rollen innebär även arbete med att skapa pipelines med hjälp av Managed DevOps Pools i Azure där du även ansvarar för att skriva YAML-konfigurationer. Du kommer att arbeta med feeds och pakethantering samt utvärdera nya verktyg och funktioner för att stärka våra tekniska flöden. En viktig del av din roll är att säkerställa att våra plattformar är förvaltade och livscykelhanterade samtidigt som du även arbetar med säkerhet som testautomatisering i leveransprocessen.
   

  

 Teamet du kommer till har ett tydligt fokus på automation, DevSecOps och Release on demand i större skala. Vi tror på frihet under ansvar, kontinuerlig förbättring och värdet av att dela kunskap. Vårt arbetssätt bygger på tillit, transparens och gemensamt lärande.
   

  

 Vi arbetar hybrid vilket innebär arbete på kontoret varvat med distansarbete. I rollen kommer du att rapportera till gruppchef IT Test- & Utvecklingsstöd.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen**
 Vi ser att du har flerårig erfarenhet som Azure DevOps Specialist eller liknande tekniska roller. Du har en god förståelse för Azure DevOps som plattform och är van vid att arbeta med YAML, Git, PowerShell och C#. För att lyckas har du erfarenhet av att bygga och underhålla CI/CT/CD-pipelines samt att arbeta med pakethantering, feeds och automatiserade flöden.
   

  

 Det är viktigt att du har jobbat enligt agila metoder, gärna inom ramverket SAFe där samarbete, struktur och förändring går hand i hand. Du har dessutom ett genuint intresse för DevSecOps och en vilja att både förenkla och förbättra inte bara koden, utan även processer och arbetssätt. Ett grundkrav är att du kan svenska flytande både i tal och skrift.
   

  

 Meriterande för rollen är om du har erfarenhet av molntjänster i Azure, hantering av containerplattformar och testautomatisering.
   

  

 Som person ser vi att du är teamorienterad, kommunikativ och engagerad. Du delar gärna med dig av din kunskap, är nyfiken på ny teknik och har ett lösningsfokuserat sätt att ta dig an arbetsuppgifter. Du är ödmjuk i din expertis och trygg i att ta en rådgivande roll gentemot andra team.
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Vi jobbar med löpande urval så tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan redan idag. I ansökan kommer vi att ställa ett antal urvalsfrågor som ligger till grund för urvalet.
   

  

 Läs mer om hela vår rekryteringsprocess här.
   

  

 Vi kommer att återkoppla till alla som söker oavsett om du går vidare eller inte.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rollen vänligen ta kontakt med rekryterande chef Izabella Rolnik på izabella.rolnik@skandia.se.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kopplat till rekryteringsprocess, vänligen ta kontakt med Talent Acquisition Partner Nina Fazeli på nina.fazeli@skandia.se
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**Mer om IT**
 Vi på Skandia IT är stolta över att vara en kundorienterad enhet som levererar effektiva och säkra lösningar för våra kunder. Med cirka 600 engagerade medarbetare är vi mitt i en spännande transformationsresa, där vi utvecklas tillsammans och har kul på vägen. Framåt tillsammans är vårt motto!
   

  

 Vi arbetar agilt och har sedan 2017 använt oss av SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) ramverket, där leverans och kundvärde alltid står i centrum. Våra tågledningar och team, jobbar verksamhetsbaserat med aktiviteter som sprintplanering, daily stand-ups, team-synk, code reviews och retrospektiv.
   

  

 Var 12:e vecka samlas vi alla i vår ljusa och inspirerande Ljusgård på kontoret i Stockholm för 2 planeringsdagar. Planeringsperioden består av 6 tvåveckorssprintar, där den sista sprinten är en innovationssprint. Här får du chansen att, själv eller tillsammans med ditt team, utveckla och förfina våra system.

title: Solutions Architect, Telco Vendors & Nordics
description:
**Description**
 AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and fastest growing small- and mid-market accounts to enterprise-level customers including public sector.
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is seeking a technical leader to help Nordics Customers and Independent Software Vendors (ISVs), and Network Equipment Providers (NEPs), and Communications service providers (CSP) transform their businesses with AWS technology.
   

  

 Solutions Architects are at the crossroads of business and technology and engage with organizations at all stages of cloud adoption. Solutions Architects also take a leading role in creating and presenting technical content and best practices.
   

  

 The problem domains are diverse: Enterprise IT Modernization, Data and GenAI, Cybersecurity, 5G monetization, digital customer journeys, OSS/BSS transformation, cybersecurity. At your disposal is the breadth of AWS.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 As part of the team, you will collaborate with customers, internal AWS teams, and AWS partners to deliver solutions to the unique challenges of information and operational technology in telecom customers.
   

  

 You will be the single-threaded owner of the AWS technology strategy for your customer and account team to drive AWS adoption. The ability to connect technology with measurable business value while assessing risks, balancing trade-offs, and encouraging risk-tasking to maximize your customer's business value of AWS is critical to a solutions architect. You should also have a demonstrated ability to think long-term about business, product, and technical outcomes.
   

  

 Role requires domestic and international (mainly Europe) travel up to 30%.
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 Understand customer business objectives and design solutions that are cost-effective, secure, and sustainable to deliver.
   

  

 Work closely with other functions (Account Managers, Partners, Support) to delight our customers.
   

  

 Build and publish external facing content.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Our team is small and motivated. We come from diverse backgrounds, but what we all have in common is a huge curiosity, a passion for delighting our customers, and a desire to deliver technology that transforms their business. What’s it like to work at AWS?
   

  

 Our team experiences high levels of collaboration, lots of multi-tasking, and often course corrections or new ideas that mean adaptability is key. We find creative and scalable solutions to our customers’ difficult problems, and we own delivering those outcomes to the customer. We are also a geographically-distributed team, which means you will need to possess a high bias for taking action without immediate team consensus.
   

  

 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.

title: Konsult - Newsec Interim Solutions
description:
*Är du konsult inom fastighetsbranschen eller går i tankarna om att ta steget dit? Anslut dig till vårt konsultnätverk och ta del av spännande uppdragsmöjligheter!*
 Newsec Interim Solutions erbjuder kvalificerade och erfarna konsulter för tillfälliga uppdrag inom fastighetsbranschen. Vi har ett brett nätverk av kompetenta interimskonsulter som hjälper våra kunder med allt från projektledning och förvaltning till affärsutveckling och strategi.
   

  

 Med över 40 kontrakterade konsulter hos företag som Castellum, Vasakronan och Corem är vi specialiserade på lösningar inom fastighetsbranschen.
   

  

 Vi tillsätter uppdrag inom:
   

  

* Fastighetsförvaltning
* Uthyrning
* Management
* Etablering
* Projektledning
* Projektutveckling
* Ekonomi/controlling
* Hyresadministration


 Oavsett roll ser vi till att ha rätt konsult tillgänglig i rätt tid och vi arbetar för att vara det självklara valet för både kunder och konsulter.
   

  

**Hur arbetar vi?**
 Varje uppdrag är unikt och vi strävar efter att göra den bästa matchningen av konsult för att uppfylla det specifika behovet i din organisation. Vi kvalitetssäkrar våra konsulter genom intervjuer, bakgrundskontroll, tester samt referenstagning för att säkerställa hög standard och långsiktiga relationer med både våra konsulter och våra uppdragsgivare.
   

  

**Vill du bli en del av vårt konsultnätverk?**
 Vi söker efter dig som vill arbeta som konsult inom fastighetsbranschen och delar vår vision om att leverera högkvalitativa resultat. Som konsult ser vi att du är en prestigelös individ som trivs i en föränderlig miljö och snabbt kan sätta dig in i verksamheten och leverera. Du är även självgående och uppskattar att dela med dig av dina erfarenheter.
   

  

 Som uppdragspartner vill vi erbjuda dig som konsult kompetensutveckling, kunskapsutbyte och samhörighet. Därmed bjuder vi löpande in våra konsulter till bland annat gästföreläsningar, kurser och nätverksträffar. Bli en del av vårt nätverk så är du varmt välkommen att delta vid nästa tillfälle!
   

  

*Vi ser fram emot att lära känna dig och utforska de möjligheter som väntar. Tillsammans skapar vi framgångsrika interimslösningar inom fastighetsbranschen.*

title: Data Architect
description:
*At* 
***Norrin***
*, we’re shaping the era of Enterprise Intelligence. Our vision is to transform business productivity through data & AI by creating solutions that deliver measurable impact. As a Microsoft technology partner, we are at the forefront of reshaping how businesses operate across the Nordics. What defines us is deep technical expertise, a creative engineering mindset, and a people-first culture. You’ll have the chance to grow in a direction that matters to you while building solutions that make a real difference. With a strong presence in Finland and growing operations in Sweden, the United States, Thailand and Vietnam, we continue to expand our Nordic roots internationally. Most recently, Swedish company* 
***BizOne***
*joined the Norrin Group, further strengthening our presence across the Nordics.*
 We’re now looking for a
 **Data Architect** 
 to join our team in Stockholm. In this role you’ll build the bridge between business context and technical delivery, helping customers move from challenges to solid, practical solutions. You’ll collaborate closely with colleagues across Finland, Thailand, and Vietnam as part of our global delivery model. If you enjoy leading customer discussions, designing robust architectures, and turning complexity into clarity, you’ll fit right in.
   

  

**🧩 What You’ll Do**
* Act as a trusted advisor and often the first point of contact for customers
* Lead discussions to understand customer processes, challenges, and objectives
* Translate business requirements into scalable, maintainable data architectures
* Design end-to-end solutions using Microsoft Fabric, Databricks, Azure data services, or hybrid setups
* Guide customers through modernization and migration scenarios (e.g., SQL Server, Teradata)
* Take ownership of solution direction and provide architectural guidance to delivery teams, ensuring consistency and best practices throughout the project
* Provide architectural leadership through the full lifecycle, from pre-sales to delivery
* Communicate complex technical topics in a clear, business-oriented way
* Collaborate with Norrin’s engineering and BI teams to ensure smooth handovers and delivery success
* Stay current on new capabilities in Azure, Fabric, and Databricks to guide customers toward solutions that stand the test of time


**🌱Why Norrin?**
* People-first culture: A workplace where you can be yourself. Our culture is built on openness, equality, and mutual respect
* Flexible working model: Our hybrid model offers the best of both worlds, flexibility in your daily life and in-person collaboration when it moves things forward
* Fair compensation: A competitive salary that reflects your skills and experience
* Grow with us: We encourage continuous learning and development in a direction that matters to you


**✨ We value**
* Strong consulting presence. Confident in leading workshops and engaging business stakeholders
* Deep understanding of cloud data architecture, modelling, and platform design
* Hands-on ability when needed (Spark, notebooks, troubleshooting, proof-of-value setups)
* Experience guiding projects from concept to commitment and supporting delivery teams post-handover
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills across teams, cultures, and organizational levels
* A collaborative mindset and interest in mentoring others
* Up-to-date knowledge of Azure, Fabric, and Databricks roadmaps and best practices
* Fluent skills in English and Swedish


**📩 Does this sound like your next opportunity?**
 We’re excited to hear from you! Please send in your application as soon as possible. Please note that we’ll take a short break over Christmas and will continue reviewing applications and moving the process forward right after the holidays in January.

title: Sr. Business Development Representative
description:
Genesys empowers organizations of all sizes to improve loyalty and business outcomes by creating the best experiences for their customers and employees. Through Genesys Cloud, the AI-powered Experience Orchestration platform, organizations can accelerate growth by delivering empathetic, personalized experiences at scale to drive customer loyalty, workforce engagement, efficiency and operational improvements.
   

  

 We employ more than 6,000 people across the globe who embrace empathy and cultivate collaboration to succeed. And, while we offer great benefits and perks like larger tech companies, our employees have the independence to make a larger impact on the company and take ownership of their work. Join the team and create the future of customer experience together.
   

  

 Are you naturally curious to explore new technologies and share their benefits with others? Are you keen to become an empathetic consultant, a real trusted advisor and Genesys ambassador? Are you always ready to jump on an ease and personalized conversation by using multithreading across email, voice, LinkedIn, video, etc. channels?
   

  

 We are seeking a commercially driven
 **Senior Business Development Representative (Snr BDR)** 
 to drive pipeline growth across the
 **Nordic region** 
 , with a primary focus on
 **Denmark and Sweden** 
 .
   

  

 This role is responsible for owning both
 **inbound and outbound pipeline generation** 
 , supporting enterprise and upper mid-market accounts, and partnering closely with cross-functional teams to accelerate revenue growth. The ideal candidate combines strong prospecting expertise with commercial awareness and a deep understanding of Nordic business culture.
   

  

 This is a high-impact role for someone who thrives in a collaborative, performance-driven environment and is motivated by building meaningful enterprise opportunities.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Own pipeline generation across Denmark and Sweden through a balanced mix of strategic outbound prospecting and inbound lead management
* Develop and execute targeted outbound account strategies aligned to territory plans and regional revenue priorities
* Qualify and convert marketing-generated leads into high-quality sales opportunities
* Research, map, and engage key decision-makers within enterprise and upper mid-market organizations
* Partner closely with Account Executives to support account planning, whitespace identification, and multi-threaded engagement strategies
* Collaborate with Marketing on regional campaigns, events, ABM initiatives, and follow-up execution
* Work cross-functionally with Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, Alliances, and Channel teams to identify expansion signals and new opportunities
* Clearly articulate the value of Genesys’ cloud and AI-driven CX solutions aligned to customer digital transformation initiatives
* Generate consistent, high-quality pipeline aligned to regional revenue targets
* Maintain disciplined CRM documentation, activity tracking, and accurate reporting in Salesforce
* Provide structured market feedback on trends, customer priorities, and competitive insights within the Nordic market
* Consistently meet and exceed KPIs related to meetings booked, pipeline generated, and opportunity conversion


**Minimum Qualifications:**
* 3–5 years of experience in a BDR, SDR, or Inside Sales role within SaaS, CX, cloud, or technology environments
* Proven success in outbound prospecting and pipeline generation within enterprise or upper mid-market accounts
* Experience managing both inbound and outbound lead flows
* Native-level fluency in Danish or Swedish (required)
* Professional fluency in English
* Strong understanding of Nordic business culture and consultative sales environments
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Strong organizational skills and CRM discipline
* Experience using Salesforce, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and modern sales engagement platforms
* Collaborative mindset with the ability to work effectively across multiple GTM functions


**Why Join Genesys?**
* Join a global leader in AI-driven customer experience technology
* Play a key role in expanding a strategically important Nordic market
* Competitive compensation with performance-based incentives
* Clear career progression pathways within a global sales organization
* Collaborative and high-performing team environment


 If a Genesys employee referred you, please use the link they sent you to apply.
   

  

**About Genesys:**
 Genesys® empowers more than 8,000 organizations worldwide to create the best customer and employee experiences. With agentic AI at its core, Genesys Cloud™ is the AI-Powered Experience Orchestration platform that connects people, systems, data and AI across the enterprise. As a result, organizations can drive customer loyalty, growth and retention while increasing operational efficiency and teamwork across human and AI workforces. To learn more, visit www.genesys.com.
   

  

**Reasonable Accommodations:**
 If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are limited in your ability to access or use this online application and need an alternative method for applying, you or someone you know may contact us at reasonable.accommodations@genesys.com.
   

  

 You can expect a response within 24–48 hours. To help us provide the best support, click the email link above to open a pre-filled message and complete the requested information before sending. If you have any questions, please include them in your email.
   

  

 This email is intended to support job seekers requesting accommodations. Messages unrelated to accommodation—such as application follow-ups or resume submissions—may not receive a response.
   

  

**Genesys is an equal opportunity employer committed to fairness in the workplace. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital status, domestic partner status, national origin, genetics, disability, military and veteran status, and other protected characteristics.**
*Please note that recruiters will never ask for sensitive personal or financial information during the application phase.*

title: Enterprise Account Executive, Sweden
description:
**Are you ready to unlock intelligence?**
 If you don’t think you meet all of the criteria below but are still interested in the job, please apply. Nobody checks every box - we’re looking for candidates that are particularly strong in a few areas, and have some interest and capabilities in others.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a committed Enterprise Account Executive with a successful background in sales and account management, ideally within open source or similar enterprise software environments. In this role, you will be a key driver of our growth strategy, directly impacting the stability and expansion of our recurring revenue. This position is ideal for a sales professional who has experience in landing new clients, retaining existing customers, and driving account expansion for early-stage enterprise products in a dynamic, entrepreneurial setting.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
 Develop and execute sales strategies to target enterprise customers, focusing on building and maintaining a robust pipeline that drives long-term growth.
   

  

* Own the entire sales cycle, from prospecting and initial outreach to contract negotiations and closing deals, while consistently meeting or exceeding revenue targets.
* Collaborate with internal teams, including product, marketing, and customer success, to ensure a seamless sales experience and alignment on customer needs.
* Identify customer pain points and align our solutions to address these, delivering customized product demos and presentations tailored to their specific business needs.
* Build and nurture relationships with C-level executives and key decision-makers within target accounts, establishing yourself as a trusted advisor and ensuring customer satisfaction and retention.
* Lead account planning efforts by researching potential customers, understanding industry trends, and developing strategies to win new business and grow existing accounts.
* Monitor and manage sales activities and results, accurately forecasting opportunities and keeping detailed records of interactions and progress in CRM systems.
* Stay updated on industry trends, competitor offerings, and market changes to position our product effectively and maintain a competitive edge.
* Contribute to business growth initiatives, providing feedback to product and marketing teams to influence product development and go-to-market strategies.
* Represent Kong with professionalism, acting as a brand ambassador at industry events, conferences, and customer meetings.


**What You’ll Bring**
* 7+ years of experience in enterprise sales (>1k employees), with a proven track record of closing complex deals in a SaaS, cloud, or enterprise software environment.
* Demonstrated success in selling to large enterprises, particularly to senior-level executives and across multiple departments.
* Strong consultative selling skills, with the ability to understand customer needs and present compelling solutions that drive business outcomes.
* Excellent communication and negotiation skills, capable of managing high-stakes conversations and building lasting relationships with stakeholders.
* A results-driven mindset, with a passion for meeting and exceeding sales goals and revenue targets.
* Experience working with CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce) and leveraging data to forecast accurately and track sales metrics.
* Knowledge of open-source software, APIs, or infrastructure software is highly advantageous.
* Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment, taking ownership of your sales territory and adapting to changing market dynamics.
* Analytical and strategic thinking, with a knack for identifying business growth opportunities and devising plans to capitalize on them.


**About Kong**
 Kong Inc., a leading developer of API and AI connectivity technologies, is building the infrastructure that powers the agentic era. Trusted by the Fortune 500 and startups alike, Kong's unified API and AI platform, Kong Konnect, enables organizations to secure, manage, accelerate, govern, and monetize the flow of intelligence across APIs and AI models. For more information, visit www.konghq.com.

title: Backend Engineer, Berlin
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger—and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal in 2018—and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco—we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management—and change lives along the way.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Backend Software Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining the server-side components of our applications. You will collaborate closely with product managers, frontend developers, and other cross-functional teams to deliver robust and scalable backend services that power critical features and support rapid growth.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**Responsibilities**
* API & Service Architecture - Design and build RESTful or GraphQL APIs, microservices, and business logic using Node.js and TypeScript.
* Database Design & Integration - Model data and manage queries using Supabase and PostgreSQL, including functions, row-level security, and real-time features.
* Cloud Infrastructure - Deploy and manage services on Google Cloud Platform (GCP), particularly with Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, IAM, and Pub/Sub.
* Code Quality & Testing - Write clean, testable code using unit, integration, and end-to-end testing frameworks (e.g., Jest). Contribute to code reviews and quality assurance practices.
* Security & Reliability - Implement secure-by-default solutions for authentication, authorization, and data protection, following Clean Code and Clean Architecture principles.
* Monitoring & Operations - Set up logging, monitoring, and alerting for backend services. Own incident response and uptime improvements.
* Team Collaboration - Participate in architecture discussions, mentor team members, and document your decisions and systems for internal knowledge sharing.


**Requirements**
* 5+ years in backend engineering roles;
* Proficiency in Node.js and TypeScript;
* Strong experience with Supabase or equivalent PostgreSQL-based backend services;
* Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (e.g., GCP, AWS, Azure), including deploying and managing services using serverless compute (e.g., Cloud Run, AWS Lambda, Azure Functions);
* Solid knowledge of Clean Code and Clean Architecture practices;
* Experience with API design (REST) and cloud-native application development;
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, testing tools, and Git workflows;
* Strong grasp of security principles, data protection, and compliance best practices;
* Effective communicator and proactive team contributor;


**What benefits are we offering?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.
   

  

 Compensation Range: €52K - €65K

title: Product Manager Nova - Debt Collection - Tieto Banktech (m/f/d)
description:

**Department: Credit & Wealth**
 Tieto Banktech powers some of the Nordics’ most trusted banking systems with secure, reliable, and scalable solutions. Using automation, data, AI, and cloud, supported by hands-on guidance, we help banks modernize their core, strengthen trust, and deliver greater impact across the banking experience.
   

  

 We are now seeking an experienced
 **Product Manager** 
 to play a strategic and influential role in shaping the future of
 **Nova – our market‑leading Debt Collection system** 
 . This role offers the opportunity to drive product vision, market positioning, development, and delivery across the Nordics and Europe. Working closely with other Product Managers and cross‑functional teams, you will ensure Nova remains the most efficient, automated, and competitive solution in the Debt Collection industry.

 Develop and execute a comprehensive product strategy aligned with business goals and market trends, ensuring it is clearly communicated internally and externally.

**Product Development**
 Collaborate with engineering and design teams to translate concepts into delivery. Ensure that the product vision and strategy are executed efficiently and effectively.

 Drive product positioning, segmentation, and differentiation. Enable sales and customer success with materials, insights, and market messaging. Contribute to customer meetings across sales, innovation, business development, RFP processes, and escalations.
   

  

**Product Roadmap**
 Define and manage the product roadmap, prioritizing enhancements based on customer needs, feedback, and market dynamics.
   

  

**User‑Centric Approach**
 Advocate for intuitive, secure, and user-friendly product experiences that meet high standards of trust and operational excellence.
   

  

**Collaboration**
 Work closely with other Product Managers, Product Owners, and the entire Debt Collection unit.
   

  

**Cross-Functional Collaboration**
 Partner with marketing, sales, engineering, and customer success teams to ensure successful launches and ongoing customer satisfaction.
   

  

**Compliance & Security**
 Ensure all Nova-related products comply with relevant regulatory and security standards.
   

  

**Required Skills & Competencies**
* Proven experience as a Product Manager within fintech, banking, or related industries
* Extensive knowledge of the Debt Collection industry in the Nordics and/or Europe
* Experience from product modernization journeys
* Strategic thinker with a track record of delivering successful products
* Strong collaboration skills in cross-functional environments
* Experience with strategic pricing, financial performance, cost calculations, and budgeting
* Ability to simplify complex information and communicate clearly to varied audiences

You will work on meaningful initiatives that directly impact our customers’ efficiency, automation capabilities, and competitive edge — all within an open culture, flexible hybrid work model, and a strong focus on continuous learning and collaboration.
   

  

**Interested?**

 .
   

  

 We perform background checks on all final candidates.
   

  

 Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.

We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
